steps.title: Use the x-intercept
steps.content: The $x$-intercept represents a possible cluster with only M-type stars. From the graph, the $x$-intercept is about $(160,0)$.

steps.title: Divide the total mass
steps.content:
If each M-type star has mass $m$, then the total mass is about $160m$:
$$
160m=129{,}492
$$
$$
m=\frac{129{,}492}{160}=809.325
$$

steps.title: Choose the closest value
steps.content: Because the intercept is read from a graph, use the closest answer choice. The closest listed value to $809.325$ is $830$. The answer is A.
